title: Healthy Vegan Chai Latte
steps:
Fill your mug 3/4 of the way with the hot boiled water, then add in chai powder and mix
*Exception to this rule is if you're using full fat coconut milk or other thick milk, then use more water
Fill the rest of the way with nut milk, and add sweetener to taste
Optional - use milk frother for extra yumminess

ingredients.name: Blue Lotus Chai Powder
ingredients.amount: 3-4 HEAPING wooden spoonfuls (using the wooden spoon that comes in the tin)

ingredients.name: Sweetener of choice
ingredients.amount: Stevia, Agave, Maple Syrup, Coconut sugar, etc.
